source_pr.title: statistics: merge partition-level TopN to global-level TopN
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: related: [#18551](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/18551)

Problem Summary:
We introduce two-level statistics for the partition tables. This PR is part of it and is used to merge topN.

### What is changed and how it works?

[Proposal](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16YouNzPG8d2Cn8pbJWY1NKCUEB_uTRmlFB1k9y5oTNQ/edit) (in Chinese)
merge multi topN to a new topN.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: rand.Seed(time.Now().Unix()) (statistics/cmsketch_test.go).

evidence: files: executor/analyze.go, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go
